name: Kartoffelsuppe (Potato Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice the potatoes, onion, and celery.
2. In a large pot, sauté the vegetables in hot vegetable oil for 3 to 5 minutes.
3. Add all of the vegetables and cover with enough boiling water to cover them.
4. Place the bay leaf and salt in the pot and boil the vegetables until they are tender.
5. Drain the vegetables and reserve the liquid.
6. Mash the vegetables into a vegetable stock.
7. Add butter to the soup.
8. Thin the soup with milk as desired; heat until warm.
9. Ladle into soup bowls and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
